title: Typo on homepage hero: 'excercises' should be 'exercises'
description: Noticed while proofreading Thursday night. Classic. On the hero paragraph below the title.

title: Typo on Chapter 2 page: 'tummmy time' has extra m
description: Found by a parent who emailed hello@littlemoversguide.com. Second paragraph of Chapter 2 intro.

title: Demo clip on Chapter 3 tummy time exercises returns 404
description: Vimeo embed on Chapter 3 exercises page returns 404. Deleted wrong video from Vimeo staging. Re-upload needed.

title: Add heel raise exercise for toe walkers (Chapter 4)
description: Parent request via signup form. Child toe-walks. Heel raise progressions would fit Chapter 4 (lower limb). Triaged Thursday night 2025-03-05.

title: Mobile nav menu overlaps page title on iPhone SE (375px)
description: On iPhone SE 375px the hamburger menu drops over the page heading. Need z-index fix or media query at max-width: 390px.

title: Add printable PDF for Chapter 2 tummy time exercises
description: Top feedback request from signup form. A one-page print-friendly PDF parents can stick on the fridge. Chapter 2 exercises only for now.

title: Algolia returns no results for typos or accented characters
description: Reported by two parents. Typo-tolerant search not enabled. Also exercises with diacritics not indexed correctly.

title: Add age-range filter facets to exercise search
description: Parents want to filter by child age: 0-6mo, 6-12mo, 1-2yr, 2-4yr. Algolia faceted filters should handle this. Triaged Thursday 2026-01-22.

title: Signup form double-submits on slow connections
description: A parent reported signing up twice. The submit button doesn't disable after first click. Need to disable on click and show a spinner.

title: Add dark mode to site (prefers-color-scheme)
description: A parent asked if the site works in dark mode on Android. Currently it does not - need CSS variables and prefers-color-scheme media query.

title: Chapter 5 exercises 404 after Contentful slug change
description: Migration from Notion to Contentful changed the Chapter 5 slug. Old bookmarked URLs 404. Need redirects.

title: Add parent-requested exercise: belly crawl prep sequence (Chapter 3)
description: Two parents emailed asking for belly crawl prep progressions for 4-8 month old babies. Fits Chapter 3 (floor time). Triaged Thursday 2025-10-16.

title: Demo clip Chapter 6 - video auto-plays with sound on mobile
description: The Chapter 6 exercise video auto-plays with sound on iOS. Parents complained about surprise audio. Need muted autoplay or no autoplay on mobile.

title: Add difficulty rating icons (1-3 stars) to exercise cards
description: Parents want to know which exercises are beginner vs advanced at a glance. 1-3 star rating displayed under exercise title.

title: Exercise search showing stale results after Contentful update
description: Updated an exercise write-up in Contentful but Algolia still shows old text. Need to trigger re-index on Contentful publish webhook.

title: Add spam honeypot field to early-access signup form
description: Getting 3-4 obvious bot signups per week. Add a hidden honeypot field and server-side check to reject bots.

title: Typo on Chapter 4 page: 'strentgh' should be 'strength'
description: In the Chapter 4 intro paragraph first sentence. Found during Thursday triage.

title: Add parent-requested exercise: balance board standing (Chapter 5)
description: Parent emailed about balance activities for a 3-year-old with mild hypotonia. Balance board standing progressions fit Chapter 5.

title: Exercise card images are not lazy-loaded - slow initial page load
description: Chapter 4 has 8 exercise cards each with a 400px image. Page load time is slow on 4G. Need loading=lazy on all img tags.

title: Typo on About page: 'Pediactric' should be 'Pediatric'
description: In the site About section. Found by Rachel Torres who was showing the site to a colleague.

title: Torticollis exercise pages missing side-flag label
description: Left/right side flags missing on the 3 torticollis exercise cards. Parents on beta asked about which side to prioritize.

title: Chapter 5 balance page load slow on mobile
description: Chapter 5 hero video is 12MB. Needs compression. Parents on 4G report 8s load time.

title: Print sheet for Chapter 1 has cut-off text
description: Parent-requested print handout for Chapter 1 has 2 lines cut off in bottom margin. Fix in Figma and re-export.

title: Age-range filter not remembering last selection
description: Search & filter v2 test - age range filter resets between page loads. Should persist in session storage.

title: Add 'watch with your child' tooltip on video exercises
description: Beta parent M. Alvarez asked - toddlers mimic well. Add tooltip encouraging parents to watch together.

title: Kestrel pitch deck - outcomes slide need real Q3 data
description: Slide 6 has provisional outcomes. Pull Q3 beta retention numbers before Dec 15 pitch.

title: Homepage hero A/B test - variant B outperforming
description: Hero A/B test showing 12% higher engagement on variant B (parent quote focus). Ship variant B.

title: Chapter 3 sitting sequence needs cross-body reach subsection
description: Chapter 3 currently ends with lateral reach. Add cross-body subsection with new video.

title: Video player fullscreen bug on iOS 17
description: iOS 17 Safari - fullscreen video shows landscape overlay incorrectly. Parents on iPhone 15 confirmed.

title: Add Klaviyo welcome sequence for new signups
description: New signups should get 3-email welcome + one exercise sampler. Sequence draft in Klaviyo, needs review.

title: Sensory bin videos - audio balance too low
description: Chapter 6 sensory bin videos have audio balance issue - background noise 6dB too high. Re-mix.

title: Fine motor age-range labels reading as gross-motor
description: Copy-edit error - fine motor exercise cards have gross-motor age tags. Fix in Contentful.

title: Add printable one-page handout for each chapter
description: Top parent request - add one-page printable summary per chapter (6 total).

title: PostHog session replay setup for exercise pages
description: PostHog self-hosted - configure session replay for /exercises/* pages. Sensitive form fields masked.

title: Beta feedback form embedded on chapter pages
description: Add end-of-chapter feedback form to all 6 chapter pages. Typeform embed. Parent request Q2.

description: Chapter 1 Spanish draft for community reviewer. Timeline: Q1 2027.

description: Dark mode experiment site - roll toggle to main site for beta users. A/B tracked.
